title: Drawers 3
description: Drawers 3 is the sequel to my "Drawers" and "Drawers 2". It adds upgradeable storage blocks that go from wood to ender. Drawers can be upgraded while containing items. warning: downgrading a drawer will delete items that don't fit. There are also backpack
body:
Drawers 3 is the sequel to my "Drawers" and "Drawers 2". When I moved my modpacks from 1.12.2 to 1.16.5, "Iron Chests" (the mod I was using in 1.12.2) didn't have a 1.16.5 version. So I made this because I didn't find any similar mods. Now that "Iron Chests" has a 1.16.5 version I realized I prefer my drawers mods over it.

It adds upgradeable storage drawers and backpacks that go from wood to netherite. Drawers can be upgraded while containing items. warning: downgrading a drawer will delete items that don't fit.

Heres Drawers 1: https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/drawers/ Drawers 2 was never released, I only made it because I lost the source code of Drawers 1 and in Drawers 2 I made some bad design choices that I wasn't happy with.
